subject: A tall gaunt spectral figure with elongated limbs and clawed hands floating in a decayed indoor staircase, wearing a wide-brimmed hat
description: A spectral humanoid figure of extreme height and thinness floats near the center of the scene. Its limbs are unnaturally elongated — the fingers extend into long talon-like claws and the arms hang at an inhuman length. It wears what appears to be a wide-brimmed hat and a flowing garment that trails off into wispy smoke or mist below the waist. The figure appears semi-translucent or insubstantial. The background is a decayed interior space — a staircase with banisters is visible on the left, thick structural columns stand behind, and a barred window or grating is faintly visible. The palette is muted ochre, grey, and deep purple, with no strong light source — the scene is dim and oppressive.
foreground: Tall spectral figure with elongated clawed hands, wide-brimmed hat, trailing mist
background: Decayed staircase, stone columns, dim barred window, warped architecture
emotion: predatory patience — the figure is still but radiates threat
